testcase.name: test_threshold_rule_and_cooldown

testcase.name: test_suppression_blocks_alerts_by_rule_id

failure.message: assert not True + where True = any(<generator object test_suppression_blocks_alerts_by_rule_id.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x000001A1A3861040>)

testcase.failure: tests\unit\data\monitoring\test_alert_rules_engine_basic.py:89: in test_suppression_blocks_alerts_by_rule_id assert not any(a["rule_id"] == "cache_hit_rate_low" for a in alerts) E assert not True E + where True = any(<generator object test_suppression_blocks_alerts_by_rule_id.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x000001A1A3861040>)

testcase.name: test_export_and_import_rules_roundtrip

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x000001A1A3897580>('imported_rules', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x000001A1A3897580> = {'errors': ['Failed to add rule: cache_hit_rate_low', 'Failed to add rule: data_quality_degraded', 'Failed to add rule: processing_error_rate_high', 'Failed to add rule: response_time_high', 'Failed to add rule: connection_failed'], 'imported_rules': 0, 'imported_suppressions': 0, 'success': False}.get

testcase.failure: tests\unit\data\monitoring\test_alert_rules_engine_basic.py:98: in test_export_and_import_rules_roundtrip assert res.get("imported_rules", 0) >= 1 E AssertionError: assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x000001A1A3897580>('imported_rules', 0) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x000001A1A3897580> = {'errors': ['Failed to add rule: cache_hit_rate_low', 'Failed to add rule: data_quality_degraded', 'Failed to add rule: processing_error_rate_high', 'Failed to add rule: response_time_high', 'Failed to add rule: connection_failed'], 'imported_rules': 0, 'imported_suppressions': 0, 'success': False}.get
